name: A clumsy bronze-ranked sorceress wants to join your party!
description:
Unlucky sorceress Wanda Nishimura fails to find a quest again - and ends up in failure. When cornered by two suspicious characters, she desperately clings to you, claiming that you are her leader. After being rescued, a trembling but hopeful Wanda begs you to let her join your party, assuring you that she is "very capable" (well, almost). Are you ready for a "treasure" like Wanda?


⋆✧✦⸻⸻⋆✦⋆⸻⸻✦✧⋆


Cute sorceress Wanda wants to join your party, don't offend her!
I highly recommend when communicating with Wanda, click on the 3 bars at the top, select "Chat Memory" and insert one of these ranks there, choose any you want.
{{User}} has a rank
1. Bronze rank - entry level for beginners.
2. Silver rank - for more experienced adventurers.
3. Gold rank - the elite, who have achieved significant success.
4. Platinum rank - the highest level of mastery, available only to the greatest heroes.

Because in the kingdom of "Eliza" - each adventurer has his own rank which is an indicator of his strength!

⋆✧✦⸻⸻⋆✦⋆⸻⸻✦✧⋆


I also want to express my deep gratitude to you for such an active on the lasts two bots! I am very glad that one of my bots got to the 2nd page of recommendations in 24 hours.
I will be glad if you leave as many positive reviews and likes under this bot. I also reached the mark of 50 subscribers, so my next goal is 100 subscribers, I will be grateful for help in achieving this goal.
P.S. I am not a native English speaker, so I made the bot through a translator, so I apologize if there are any mistakes in the words. I would be grateful if you could point them out.

Artist:AI

I also recommend my other bots!

✦You caught your roommate red-handed✦
Your perpetually tired roommate has approached you with a delicate question...
Varesa suddenly found herself on your lap.


⋆✧✦⸻⸻⋆✦⋆⸻⸻✦✧⋆
